description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist black-and-white color scheme. The front features a covered carport with a transparent roof, adjacent to a main entry door and several rectangular windows. The property is enclosed by a low hedge fence, and the backyard includes a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a small landscaped area with trees and shrubs. The rear of the house has a shaded patio area with outdoor seating, and large sliding glass doors provide access to the backyard. The windows are arranged in a clean, linear fashion, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes geometric lines, open outdoor spaces, and functional living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with a black-and-white exterior, carport, and a backyard featuring a pool and landscaped garden. The design is minimalist with linear windows and open outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport with a transparent roof, and several rectangular windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, stair access, and the backyard with a swimming pool and lounge area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the shaded patio, large sliding glass doors, pool, and garden seating area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid black wall, carport, and landscaped garden with lounge chairs and a tree.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door under a covered carport, no steps, and minimal decorative elements.
